rag_rules: Use assume/guarantee labels and eq/const declarations for AGREE syntax
Place assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
generic_rules: Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) for contract logic
Use visible identifiers from the current component scope
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use exact AGREE scalar type names (int, real, bool)
anti_patterns: Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit ports or constants
Do not invent declarations for unresolved references; use exact visible identifiers
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names are not AGREE variables
